issues.description: Target must include both opponent's DON!! cards AND Characters with cost ≤3. Current DSL only targets Characters. Need to support multiple target types (DON cards + Characters).

Missing second action: the restrictive effect 'you cannot add Life cards to your hand using your own effects during this turn' must be represented. This is a conditional restriction during the current turn (duration: DuringYourTurn).
Effect uses 'You may' (optional), but DSL shows mandatory Rest. Should clarify optionality in the action structure if the system supports it.
